p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 new repo_tests pass_to_pass gates. CI commands tested from .github/workflows/test-rust.yaml: (1) cargo check -p prqlc --all-targets, (2) cargo test -p prqlc --doc. Tests added to test_outputs.py: test_prqlc_check_all_targets (validates tests/examples compile), test_prqlc_doc_tests (validates documentation examples). All 6 pass_to_pass tests pass (including 4 existing: syntax_check, existing_gen_query_tests, test_prqlc_clippy, test_prqlc_tests_pass).

validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Docker build succeeds. NOP test correctly fails (reward=0) - tests panic at module.rs:258 due to .unwrap() on None. Gold test passes (reward=1) - all 8 tests pass including 2 fail-to-pass tests (join_group_returns_error, error_mentions_context). Rubric judge ICR=1.0.
